'''''Manus Ferre''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] used by the [[Dimok (people)|Dimoks]]. She was present at a meeting between the leaders of both factions that was raided by Imperials who intended to capture the leaders of both factions only to kidnap their children instead.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

*<!-- 1994-07-18 -->''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
*<!-- 1996-04-XX -->''[[TIE Fighter Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
